title: Toucan Pet
body:
This mod adds a Toucan in Minecraft that gives you abilities

Also he breakdances!!!!!

 

HOW TO GET HIM???

      - Find jungle (he rare)

      - Give him melon seeds!!!!! :P

      -  Also Poppies give him full health back!!!!

 

 

HOW TO BECOME GOD?

      - Give him an Enchanted Golden Apple
